description: Transcript of a three-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program

Cowan remembers his father, Robert E. Cowan: his bookselling in San Francisco; his move to Los Angeles as librarian for William Andrews Clark, Jr.; working with his father on California bibliographies; and his own writing
